chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) An applicant for a permit under this subchapter must designate each county and municipality in which the permit will be used.

(b) A permit issued under this subchapter is not valid in a county or municipality that is not designated in the permit application.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.403 — County and Municipality Designation

(a) An applicant for a permit under this subchapter must designate each county and municipality in which the permit will be used.

(b) A permit issued under this subchapter is not valid in a county or municipality that is not designated in the permit application.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: An applicant for a permit under this subchapter must designate each county and municipality in which the permit will be used.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A permit issued under this subchapter is not valid in a county or municipality that is not designated in the permit application.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 108 (S.B.1524), Sec. 3, eff. January 1, 2018.
